metadata.description: Criar README.md com: visão geral da arquitetura, pré-requisitos (podman, podman-compose, firewall), como buildar, como iniciar/parar, como verificar logs, como customizar (senha, usuário, range DHCP, interface), troubleshooting comum.
metadata.goal: Documentação completa de uso, pré-requisitos, operação e troubleshooting
acceptanceCriteria: Troubleshooting: iPXE loop, DHCP conflict, SELinux, firewall

summary: Created comprehensive README.md (395 lines) covering architecture diagram, prerequisites (podman, podman-compose, firewall ports), build/start/stop commands, log viewing, customization (interface, DHCP range, gateway, DNS, passwords), file structure, and troubleshooting (iPXE loop, DHCP conflict, SELinux, firewall, bootloader missing, installation failures). All 11 acceptance criteria met. Entrypoint and nginx tests pass (10/10, 8/8) - no regressions.
